current_question: How well do SAE features transfer across model scales and fine-tunes? Are there better SAE training objectives than L1?
filter_outs: Pure theory papers with no empirical evaluation, capabilities work that doesn't bear on interpretation, RLHF methodology papers, AI policy/governance
freeform: Research engineer in mechanistic interpretability, focused on sparse autoencoders and feature-based analysis. Strongly prefer empirical work with concrete results on real models over frameworks or pure math. Care about feature splitting, dictionary learning at scale, SAE evaluation methods, and circuit-level explanations using SAE features.
